title: Funky Anchovy Tapas
description: A Spanish-inspired snack that combines the flavors of funkiness with anchovies. Perfect for a dinner party or a quick snack.
instructions: Arrange the crumbly crackers on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the Portuguese olive oil over the crackers and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
Top each cracker with a slice of funky cheese and an anchovy fillet.
Serve immediately, garnished with ceviche-grade fish if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of mixed greens for a light salad.
